name: The Mythical City 4
short_description: Hordes of monsters are moving towards your cities to stop them, build walls, place magic books that will attack the enemy, hire soldiers!
detailed_description:
Hordes of monsters are moving towards your cities to stop them, build walls, place magic books that will attack the enemy, hire soldiers! The enemy will attack not only from near, but from afar. Some enemies are divided into parts, after death, some have a large reserve of health. It depends on your decisions whether you win or lose.

Features:
  • Dynamic gameplay
  • Crowds of different enemies
  • A tactical game
  • Different ways to defend against enemies
  • 10 levels of the game
  • Saving current wins
  • Interesting gameplay
